llm_extracted.ai_arm_selection_rationale: Only one AI-assisted arm available. All participants completed both conditions (first assignment without genAI, third assignment with genAI after instruction), making this a within-subject design.
llm_extracted.notes: Within-subject design where all participants completed both conditions. Sample size n not reported in arms but can be inferred from test statistic df(1,23) suggesting n=24 or 25 participants. The 64.5% reduction is consistent with the means: (68.1-191.8)/191.8 = -0.645. F-statistic reported rather than t-statistic for the paired comparison.
source_quotes: There was a significant main effect of writing condition on writing time (f(1,23) = 23.15, p < .001, ηp2 = .50) showing that students spent significantly less time writing their memo when they used genAI assistance.

computed.notes: Within-subject design where all participants completed both conditions. Sample size n not reported in arms but can be inferred from test statistic df(1,23) suggesting n=24 or 25 participants. The 64.5% reduction is consistent with the means: (68.1-191.8)/191.8 = -0.645. F-statistic reported rather than t-statistic for the paired comparison. | SDs/SEs missing; variance not computable
